packages.name: android_system_properties
packages.description: Minimal Android system properties wrapper

packages.name: anyhow
packages.description: Flexible concrete Error type built on std::error::Error

packages.name: autocfg
packages.description: Automatic cfg for Rust compiler features

packages.name: bitflags
packages.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

packages.name: bumpalo
packages.description: A fast bump allocation arena for Rust.

packages.name: cc
packages.description:
A build-time dependency for Cargo build scripts to assist in invoking the native
C compiler to compile native C code into a static archive to be linked into Rust
code.

packages.name: cfg-if
packages.description:
A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg]
parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the
item that gets emitted.

packages.name: chrono
packages.description: Date and time library for Rust

packages.name: core-foundation-sys
packages.description: Bindings to Core Foundation for macOS

packages.name: crossterm
packages.description: A crossplatform terminal library for manipulating terminals.

packages.name: crossterm_winapi
packages.description: WinAPI wrapper that provides some basic simple abstractions around common WinAPI calls

packages.name: either
packages.description: The enum `Either` with variants `Left` and `Right` is a general purpose sum type with two cases.

packages.name: errno
packages.description: Cross-platform interface to the `errno` variable.

packages.name: fd-lock
packages.description: Advisory cross-platform lock on a file using a file descriptor to it.

packages.name: find-msvc-tools
packages.description: Find windows-specific tools, read MSVC versions from the registry and from COM interfaces

packages.name: heck
packages.description: heck is a case conversion library.

packages.name: iana-time-zone
packages.description: get the IANA time zone for the current system

packages.name: iana-time-zone-haiku
packages.description: iana-time-zone support crate for Haiku OS

packages.name: itertools
packages.description: Extra iterator adaptors, iterator methods, free functions, and macros.

packages.name: js-sys
packages.description:
Bindings for all JS global objects and functions in all JS environments like
Node.js and browsers, built on `#[wasm_bindgen]` using the `wasm-bindgen` crate.

packages.name: libc
packages.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

packages.name: linux-raw-sys
packages.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
packages.description: Generated bindings for Linux's userspace API

packages.name: linux-raw-sys
packages.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
packages.description: Generated bindings for Linux's userspace API

packages.name: lock_api
packages.description: Wrappers to create fully-featured Mutex and RwLock types. Compatible with no_std.

packages.name: log
packages.description: A lightweight logging facade for Rust

packages.name: memchr
packages.description:
Provides extremely fast (uses SIMD on x86_64, aarch64 and wasm32) routines for
1, 2 or 3 byte search and single substring search.

packages.name: mio
packages.description: Lightweight non-blocking I/O.

packages.name: nu-ansi-term
packages.description: Library for ANSI terminal colors and styles (bold, underline)

packages.name: num-traits
packages.description: Numeric traits for generic mathematics

packages.name: once_cell
packages.description: Single assignment cells and lazy values.

packages.name: parking_lot
packages.description: More compact and efficient implementations of the standard synchronization primitives.

packages.name: parking_lot_core
packages.description: An advanced API for creating custom synchronization primitives.

packages.name: proc-macro2
packages.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

packages.name: quote
packages.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

packages.name: redox_syscall
packages.description: A Rust library to access raw Redox system calls

packages.name: reedline
packages.description: A readline-like crate for CLI text input

packages.name: rustix
packages.license: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
packages.description: Safe Rust bindings to POSIX/Unix/Linux/Winsock-like syscalls

packages.name: rustversion
packages.description: Conditional compilation according to rustc compiler version

packages.name: scopeguard
packages.description:
A RAII scope guard that will run a given closure when it goes out of scope,
even if the code between panics (assuming unwinding panic).

Defines the macros `defer!`, `defer_on_unwind!`, `defer_on_success!` as
shorthands for guards with one of the implemented strategies.

packages.name: serde
packages.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

packages.name: serde_core
packages.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

packages.name: serde_derive
packages.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

packages.name: shlex
packages.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.

packages.name: signal-hook
packages.description: Unix signal handling

packages.name: smallvec
packages.description: 'Small vector' optimization: store up to a small number of items on the stack

packages.name: strip-ansi-escapes

packages.name: unicode-ident

packages.name: unicode-segmentation

This crate provides Grapheme Cluster, Word and Sentence boundaries

packages.name: unicode-width
